  Line 87:   `application/octet-stream` response (Python-native `tarfile`, no host-path
  Line 144: - [ ] **Step 6 — Hub Actions (allowlisted, H7).** Add an Actions area on `/hub` (auth-gated section): POST `/hub/action/refresh` (force-bust `_GH_CACHE` + summary cache, re-poll) and POST `/hub/action/backup` (Python-native `tarfile` of `DATA_DIR` written to a temp file, returned as `application/octet-stream` download — no host-path script, container-correct). Both gated by `is_authenticated()`. No shell passthrough, no subprocess to arbitrary paths. Verify: refresh clears caches and re-polls; backup returns a valid `.tar.gz` containing the curation/monitors/bookmarks JSON; unauthenticated → 403.

→ Use /swarm retrieve S1 for full content
